rulings.Case Title: SHAUNAK SAYTA VS. EDMUND CHU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To File Confidential Documents Under Seal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 8 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF SHAUNAK SAYTA's Motion To File Confidential Documents Under Seal DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff has failed to meet his burden to demonstrate, with specificity, what information he contends is subject to the right of privacy, and how sealing will protect that right. (See C.R.C., Rule 2.550(d).) = (501/REQ)
